0:56 - 0:103: Sabse badi cheez toh yeh hoti hai ki aapka teacher ka guidance rehta hai isme offline mein jo ki online mein aapko nahi mil pata hai. Thik hai?
0:103 - 0:110: Doosri cheez yeh hai ki aap agar online classes aap attend karte ho toh ek saath aapke saath hazaaron laakhon bachhe padh rahe hote hain jisme aap comment karke agar aap apna doubt puchoge na...

0:110 - 0:114: Toh mushkil hai ki aapka usme number diya jaye. Thik hai? Yeh cheez aapki rahegi.
0:114 - 0:121: Teacher se student se koi aapka contact nahi reh jata hai. Uske alawa agar hum baat karen competition ki toh competition ke liye na aapka jo ek exam hota hai SSC ka exam ho gaya...
0:121 - 0:128: Banking ka exam ho gaya ya koi bhi ho gaya, yeh saare aapke competitive examination hai but jab tak aap us competition ko feel nahi karoge...
0:128 - 0:134: Haan jab tak aapko woh environment nahi milega tab tak aapko achha perform karne mein kuch nahi milta hai.
0:134 - 0:141: Agar aap online preparation karte ho apne ghar par reh karke toh aap apne comfort zone mein rehte ho. Aap jitna bhi try kar lo motivate hone ka jitni bhi cheezein aap try kar lo aapka rahega woh comfort zone.
0:141 - 0:146: Right? Ki agar abhi classes nahi hui toh thodi der ke baad kar lenge, nahi hui kal kar lenge. Thik hai?
0:146 - 0:154: Yeh cheezein hamari online mein hoti hain and agar aap offline join karte ho na toh aapko ek competitive environment milega kyunki yahan par aapke regular test hote hain aur bhi bachhe hote hain.
0:154 - 0:200: Aapko apna jo competition hai na woh aapke surrounding mein hi nazar aata hai toh aapke andar ek competitive motivation ek aapka rehta hai jo ki aapko aage push karta hai achha perform karne ke liye.

0:200 - 0:207: Aapka classroom mein baat hoti hai aur regular classes hoti hain toh daily aaoge toh teachers padhayenge, teachers padhayenge toh aap sunoge.
0:207 - 0:211: Yahan pe aap agar aaj nahi padhoge toh lazy banoge toh yahan pe aapko koi tokne wala nahi hai online mein.
0:211 - 0:218: Haan bilkul, ji ji bilkul aur competition abhi aisa hai saare laakhon student ek hi cheez padh rahe hain, ek hi cheez ka exam de rahe hain.
0:218 - 0:225: Lekin agar aap us cheez ko lekar ke dedicated nahi ho aur agar aap consistent nahi rehte ho us cheez ko lekar ke toh phir aapko exam mein result dekhne ke liye nahi milega waisa jaisa aapko chahiye.
0:225 - 0:232: Jaisa bhi requirement hai toh yeh cheezein hoti hain. Fees ko lekar ke difference isliye isme rehta hai kyunki offline mein aapki facilities hoti hain.
0:232 - 0:238: Aap yeh dekho agar aap online padh rahe ho toh aapka kya use hota hai usme? Like aap ghar par baith karke aaraam se padh rahe ho, aapka koi kharch nahi aata hai.
0:238 - 0:244: Aap jo pay kar rahe ho aap apni classes ke liye pay kar rahe ho aur aapko jo wahan se content mila aap uske liye pay kar rahe ho. That's it.
0:244 - 0:250: But agar aap offline mein aa rahe ho toh offline mein kai saari cheezein hoti hain. You are enough to understand ki aapka koi coaching center chal raha hai wahan pe...

0:250 - 0:256: Haan wahan par aapke counselors hain wahan par aapke teaching teachers baithe hue hain wahan par kai saari cheezein manage karni hoti hain.
0:256 - 0:300: Poora AC hai wahan pe aapke CCTV camera lage hue hain in sabka management kahan se aayega?
0:300 - 0:302: Achha achha.
0:302 - 0:306: Aur ma'am ek aur... ma'am jo jo data hota hai jaise DPPs milte hain aur jo daily test hote hain...
0:306 - 0:307: Haan.
0:307 - 0:310: Woh jo hota hai woh online mein milega ya woh offline mein milega?
0:310 - 0:313: Dono mein milta hai aapko DPPs.
0:313 - 0:318: Aur ma'am jitne bhi DPPs ke alawa jitne bhi papers hote hain jo mock tests hote hain jitne bhi mock tests hote hain jo offline mein hote hain online mein milte hain ya nahi milte?

0:318 - 0:326: Offline aur online wale mocks aapko nahi milenge. Online aapke jo jis bhi batch mein aap join karte ho. Thik hai? Suppose abhi SSC exams ki agar hum baat karen...
0:326 - 0:332: Toh SSC mein hamara most popular batch jo abhi chal raha hai woh aapka chalta hai Safar batch. Safar batch hai, Daksh batch hai yeh aapko batches mil jayenge.
0:332 - 0:338: Inme jab aap join karte ho na toh isme aapko 20 se 25 mock tests ka aapko set mil jayega. Thik hai? Woh time-ly upload hota jayega aapko sirf wahi content usme milta hai.
0:338 - 0:341: Aur offline wala matlab online wala offline mein nahi milta aapne yeh bola?
0:341 - 0:347: Online wali cheezein aapko offline mein mil jayengi lekin jo offline mein aapko practice ke liye content mil raha hai na woh aapko online mein nahi mil payega.

This collection of audio files consists of phone conversations between senior academic counselors at Physics Wallah (PW) and individuals inquiring about various educational courses and administrative issues.
Inquiries for Offline Coaching
Several callers seek information regarding offline (classroom-based) coaching in different cities:
Agra: A caller is informed that a new batch for the SSC Foundation course begins on April 15, with demo classes ongoing since March 30. The center operates between 1:30 PM and 4:30 PM.
Kanpur: New batches for SSC preparation at the Kanpur center are scheduled to start the following week. The counselor clarifies that while they prepare for the written portions of exams like SSC Stenographer, they do not provide shorthand training.
Ranchi: A counselor provides details for a student interested in SSC and Railway exams. The "Super Foundation" batch is recommended, which offers nine months of preparation for Pre and Mains and three years of card validity.
Varanasi: A student inquiring about SSC MTS is told that the "Super Foundation" batch is best for those starting from zero, offering 9 months of classes and 13 hard-copy books.

Online Course Support and Redirections
Counselors frequently assist callers by redirecting them to the appropriate online support teams:
Account and Technical Issues: Callers reporting issues with online batches, such as missing classes or deleted accounts, are directed to call the online support helpline at 8448982616.
Course Inquiries: Individuals asking about online batches for the Bihar Police, UPSC "Prarambh", or technical subjects like Data Analytics are told their numbers will be shared with the online department for a follow-up call.
Other Administrative Interactions
Job Inquiries: A caller asking about teaching vacancies is informed that the academic counseling line is for student inquiries only and is directed to check the "Careers" section on the PW website.
Real Estate: An individual offering a 650-square-foot commercial space for a PW center is told that their contact information has already been shared with the relevant department.
